data.name: Dual Cultivation Trainer
data.detailed_description:
For cultivators the path up the mountain is long and narrow.

Suyin was gifted with strong spiritual roots and natural aptitude. But fate has strangled her progress with an insurmountable bottle-neck. Now, the jade beauty has come to you — the old monster of the abandoned monastery —with a desperate plea. Dual cultivation — the forbidden art of cultivating through sex — it's the only technique that can push her through. If her sect discovers what she's doing, she'll be expelled, her name erased, and her cultivation crippled. But if she succeeds...

What you do with this arrangement — whether you guide her to a righteous breakthrough or somewhere darker — is entirely up to you.

Train. Teach. Corrupt — or don't.

Dual Cultivation Trainer is an erotic trainer with a branching corruption and relationship system that evolves as you train Suyin in five forbidden techniques.

  • Tongue of the Serpent — Trace the path. Stay in the channel. When she grips the sheets, you're doing it right.

  • Meridian Mapping — Find every spot that makes her gasp. Hit them in the right order. Hold pressure until she can't keep quiet.

  • Breath of Still Water — Let her take you deep. Match the rhythm. Ride the surges without gagging her on the wave.

  • Spirit Cartography — Her body hides what it wants under silk and composure. Read the heat with your hands.

  • Jade Gate Tempering — The dark gate. Angle, depth, rhythm — slow until she stops clenching, then as deep as she can take.

Corruption Is a Real Choice

The forbidden path is faster with stronger techniques, faster qi regeneration and access to the Hunt — seducing and draining rival cultivators for their qi. It's the optimal strategy, but it will change her. The woman who flinched at your touch on day one will become something else entirely.  There are four tiers of transformation — Righteous, Wavering, Fallen, Demonic — each influencing how she speaks, looks, what she wants and what she's willing to do.

The path you walk together determines which of the seven endings you reach.

data.short_description: Please, senior. I've hit a bottleneck in my cultivation and I have no way to breakthrough. My body is yours if you'll help me master my qi. Take me... teach me... dual cultivation!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 20.04 (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
